title: What is Express? Installing and Setting Up
description: Meet Express, the most popular Node framework, and set up your first app.

slides.title: Express.js – The Unopinionated Framework 🚂
slides.content:
# What is Express?

Express is a fast, unopinionated, minimalist web framework for Node.js. It provides a thin layer of fundamental web application features, without obscuring Node's features.

**Why Express?**
- Simplifies routing
- Middleware architecture
- Large ecosystem of middleware
- Used by many companies and frameworks (e.g., NestJS, Sails)

It's not a replacement for Node's `http` module – it builds on top of it.

slides.title: Installing Express 📦
slides.content:
## Setup

Create a new project and install express:

```bash
mkdir my-express-app
cd my-express-app
npm init -y
npm install express
```

Now create an `app.js` file and require express.

slides.title: Your First Express App

quizData.question: What does `app.listen(3000)` do in Express?
quizData.explanation: `app.listen` binds the server to a port and starts listening.
